title: GTDB Classify Module
description: Identify marker genes and assign taxonomic classifications

min_af.description: Minimum alignment fraction to consider closest genome

min_perc_aa.description: Filter genomes with an insufficient percentage of AA in the MSA

gtdb_tmp.description: Specify alternative directory for temporary files

gtdb_use_scratch.description: Reduce pplacer memory usage by writing to --gtdb_tmp location (slower)

gtdb_debug.description: Create intermediate files for debugging purposes

gtdb_keep_msa.description: Keep the MSA file for all submitted and reference genomes

force_gtdb.description: Continue processing if an error occurs on a single genome
